params.name: Purple Gold Gourd
params.description: This treasure once belonged to the Prime of Taoism. It can refine everything in the world and has a unique ability against opponents. If the owner holds the gourd and calls out the opponent's name, the latter will be sucked in once they respond. Even a great immortal cannot escape from it!
